标题: MaxMara Labbro jacquard lining loose bathrobe-style cashmere coat. Original custom-made design with exquisite craftsmanship. Hand-sewn with unique tailoring, this piece is truly exceptional. The loose fit and open front design make it stand out. Made of soft and warm cashmere, it exudes luxury. The open design accentuates femininity, especially when paired with a belt to cinch the waist. Elegant, high-end, and charming, this coat is a must-have for sophisticated women. Available in sizes S, M, and L.

🔥🔥Original top-quality! Maxmara's counter-synchronized custom-made Labbro heavyweight pure handmade double-sided cashmere water ripple tied waist loose bathrobe warm coat outerwear 😘😘 Original mold custom-made‼️ Handmade sewing combined with unique tailoring destined this coat to be extraordinary✔️ When wearing this excellent coat, you won't even see the other clothes underneath👍🏻 This coat is enough to express yourself, that's what a top-notch coat is all about! Maxm*ra Labbro is such a coat! This coat is enough to showcase the beauty of different women! You get what you pay for, not just a reputation, cashmere is very soft and warm🔥, making it a favorite of luxury goods! The top-notch feature is also reflected in its beautiful water ripples, the real Labbro shines with the best material, shimmering! Water ripple is a processing technique, using professional machines to lightly push on the fabric to create a rippling water effect on the surface to enhance aesthetics! Loose oversized fit~ suits everyone Open skirt design is one of Labbro's characteristics, unique to Labbro! Not overly exaggerated open-cut design, the swinging skirt highlights femininity, paired with a waist belt to slim and cover, elegant, sophisticated, and uniquely charming, full of taste! Truly deserving of its quality and beauty! A must-have for high-end fashionistas' wardrobes! Choose this Labbro as your winter battle armor💗 ‼️Provide height, weight, and size when placing an order‼️ Sizes: SML
